---
title: "Example Analysis Report"
author: "Hakile Resulbegoviq"
format: html
---

## Research question

Is perceived stress associated with well-being among students in the synthetic Balkan student dataset?

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(broom)

data <- read_csv("data/raw/student_wellbeing_balkan.csv")
```

## Descriptive statistics

```{r}
data |>
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_stress = mean(perceived_stress),
    sd_stress = sd(perceived_stress),
    mean_wellbeing = mean(wellbeing),
    sd_wellbeing = sd(wellbeing)
  )
```

## Regression model

```{r}
model <- lm(wellbeing ~ perceived_stress + academic_motivation + sleep_hours, data = data)
tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE)
```

## Interpretation

In this synthetic dataset, higher perceived stress is expected to be associated with lower well-being, after controlling for motivation and sleep. This example is for teaching only and should not be interpreted as evidence about real students.
